description_long: This street food stall features a rectangular wooden base with a light tan canopy supported by black metal poles. The front panel displays bold red Japanese characters and a bowl of noodles with chopsticks, suggesting an Asian cuisine focus. The countertop is equipped with various cooking and serving equipment, including a cash register, a drink dispenser, and trays of food items, all neatly organized. The side panels also feature large red Japanese characters, adding to the stall's visual appeal and branding. The wood grain texture on the lower panels and the slightly wrinkled canopy give the stall a rustic yet inviting appearance. The overall design is compact, functional, and visually striking, making it suitable for busy urban environments.
description: A compact wooden street food stall with a tan canopy, bold red Japanese signage, and a well-equipped serving counter featuring trays and cooking equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main signage with red Japanese characters, a bowl logo, and the full serving counter with trays and equipment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large red Japanese characters on the canopy and a partial view of the countertop and equipment.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full canopy, the layout of the countertop, and the arrangement of equipment and trays.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with prominent red Japanese characters on the canopy and a clear look at the side of the counter and food trays.
attribute_signage: Large red Japanese characters and a bowl with chopsticks graphic on the front and side panels, set against a tan background; signage is bold and visually prominent.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, rectangular counter made of wood with a matte finish, featuring trays for food, a cash register, and a drink dispenser; the counter is open and accessible from the front.
attribute_food_display: Food items are arranged in open trays on the counter, easily visible and accessible to customers, with no protective glass or cover.
attribute_architectural_style: traditional wooden cart with modern signage
